query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.userId, o.customerName, st.stamps, st.id as txId
FROM orders o
JOIN stamp_transactions st ON st.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderStatus = 'cancelled' AND st.action = 'earn'
ORDER BY o.orderNumber DESC;
